error.signature: Error: Default interface methods are only supported starting with Android 7.0 (API 24)
error.regex: (Default interface methods.*only supported|desugaring|Lambda.*not supported.*API|java\.lang\.invoke.*not supported|requires.*API level)

verdict.summary: Java 8+ features used but desugaring not enabled. minSdk too low or compileOptions missing.

dead_ends.action: Raise minSdk to 26+ to support all Java 8 features
dead_ends.why_fails: Excludes older devices. Enable desugaring instead to support Java 8 on all API levels.

dead_ends.action: Rewrite code to avoid Java 8 features (lambdas, default methods)
dead_ends.why_fails: Unnecessary; Android toolchain supports desugaring to convert these to older bytecode

workarounds.how: android { compileOptions { sourceCompatibility JavaVersion.VERSION_1_8; targetCompatibility JavaVersion.VERSION_1_8 } }

workarounds.action: Enable core library desugaring for java.time and streams on older APIs
workarounds.how: android { compileOptions { coreLibraryDesugaringEnabled true } }; dependencies { coreLibraryDesugaring 'com.android.tools:desugar_jdk_libs:2.0.4' }
